features: MPN:12PC INNOVATIVE MAGIC DRAIN CLEANER STICKS
description: Product description DESCRIPTION: Innovative drain maintenance, helps prevent the gradual build up of blockages and bad smells in kitchens and bathrooms Regular use will help keep your drains free flowing and smelling clean Can be used in sinks, baths and showers Set contains 12 sticks, each stick is effective for a month - 1 Year Supply Directions Easy to use: simply insert the stick into the drain for convenient maintenance
